task: Parse an AWS CloudWatch log entry and extract the timestamp, log level, and message using a regular expression
solution_criteria: The regex must correctly capture three groups: ISO 8601 timestamp, log level (ERROR, WARN, INFO, DEBUG), and the remaining message text. Should handle various log formats.

task: Create a Python function that validates if an AWS S3 bucket name follows AWS naming conventions (lowercase, 3-63 characters, no consecutive hyphens)
solution_criteria: Function should return a boolean value. Must validate length (3-63), lowercase letters only, hyphens allowed but not at start/end or consecutive. Handle edge cases.

task: Generate a JSON CloudFormation template snippet for an AWS IAM policy that grants read-only access to a specific S3 bucket
solution_criteria: Valid JSON with correct IAM policy structure including Version, Statement, Effect, Action, and Resource fields. Actions should be S3 read-only (GetObject, ListBucket). Resource ARN must reference the bucket.
